Teaching you how to clean your toilet 101.
.
.
.
A few things you should know
.
. Clorox was rinsed before I went in with soap so there’s no mixing going on over here.
. I also cleaned the tank and handle on the outside. But that clip got deleted.
. Most toilet seat CAN be removed.
.if you can’t use bleach, there’s alternatives, any disinfecting cleaner will work.
.if you have hard water stains, use a damp pumice stone to remove them. You can find it at Walmart.
.
.
.

latestPosts.caption:
Surprise!!!!! 🥳
• The printed and updated version of my Ebook is now available to purchase through the link in my bio on Amazon prime. 
• And it’s available in Spanish as well! 
• Thank you sooo much because without you… this would not have been possible. I know y’all have been waiting for this and so have I❤️

What a crazy ride this year has been… I’m so excited to announce that I am officially @clorox spokesperson, I also started creating my line with @scrubdaddy. And I created my cleaning ebook. All of this happened because of you guys. So thank you from the bottom of my heart ❤️
